title: ipomoea retropilosa
intro: Ipomoea retropilosa, also known as the "prickly morning glory", is a species of flowering plant in the family Convolvulaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Ipomoea retropilosa include its ability to reduce swelling and pain, and it has also been used to treat wounds and skin conditions. The plant is typically prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
